s: In 2023, Jhony Brito suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.280, WHIP 1.220, SO 72, WAR 0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (NYY -> SDP).
In 2024, Jhony Brito suited up for SDP as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.120, WHIP 1.350, SO 29, WAR 0.300. Notable context: Joined SDP.
